title: Unbreakable Vases for Flowers, Shatter-Proof Transparent Grey Acrylic Vase, Cylinder Flower Vase for Mother’s Day, Wedding, Home, Living Room, Dining Table, Office Decor - 10x20cm
features: Premium Material: The vase is made of high-quality acrylic material, which is sturdy, durable, non- fragile, and easy to clean. It won't break like glass or ceramics, which is safe and durable. The bottle mouth is polished smooth, with thickened bottom, not easy to shake, without sharp corners overall, making flower arrangement much more stable (Does not include flowers)

Unbreakable Cylinder Vase: This shatter-proof acrylic flower vase showcases floral arrangements with modern elegance. The transparent grey minimalist design enhances any bouquet, creating a stylish table centerpiece for home decor, dining tables, offices, or wedding venues

Scandinavian-Inspired Acrylic Vase: This shatter-resistant minimalist vase elevates modern home decor as a versatile centerpiece for kitchen countertops, living room shelves, office desks, and cafes. Its sleek cylindrical design complements authentic Nordic, minimalist, and contemporary interiors, offering a durable acrylic alternative to fragile glass

Shatter-Proof Acrylic Vase Dimensions: This transparent grey cylinder vase measures 10cm (diameter) x 20cm (height), weighing 0.23kg. Featuring sleek minimalist design, it is significantly lighter than fragile glass vases while offering unbreakable, drop-resistant durability — ideal for worry-free use on tabletops, shelves, and busy spaces like office desks or cafes

The Perfect Gift: This modern flower vase makes a thoughtful present for Mother's Day, birthdays, Thanksgiving, Anniversaries, bridal showers, and housewarmings. Its minimalist design suits any décor — simply fill it with fresh, dried, or faux flowers for instant elegance
description: Product Description Make an impressive moment with this beautiful acrylic Vase! Koelaa modern vase is perfect for living room accessories, which is intended to showcase your style with this decorative vase, thus creating a space in your home with refined rustic, yet elegant and effortlessly beautiful piece. Vases for flowers are crafted of premium quality crystal clear acrylic to maximize content visibility. It’s lightweight, shatter-proof, long lasting and easy to take care of, which is ideal for your daily use anytime and anywhere. Vases in Various Sizes Perfect for Every Occasion Available in different heights and sizes—ideal for fresh bouquets or stylish dried flowers! Material: Acrylic Color: Transparent Grey Mix and match vases to create your own unique space. Safe & Durable Easy to Clean The perfect container for decorative flowers and plants. Smooth openning mouth The bottle neck is smooth and rounded, with a flat surface that is gentle on the hands. Thickened design The heavy base and the round body design makes the vase the most stable and durable for daily flower arrangements. An elegant simple design vase with crystal-clear is ideal for wedding centerpieces, home office decorations, restaurant or flower shop presentations. Koelaa modern vase is perfect for living room accessories, which is intended to showcase your style with this decorative vase, thus creating a space in your home with refined rustic, yet elegant and effortlessly beautiful piece. Brings your flowers a beautiful display. Perfect art decoration for your home, kitchen, dining room, living room, bedroom, office, restaurant, flower shop. The acrylic flower vase worked great for pampas, roses and tulips, bamboo plant, flowers, hydrangea blooms, cotton balls, faux flower arrangement, amaryllis, gladiolus, decorate with sea shells, sand, rocks, water, beads. If you're looking for the perfect gift to crown a Christmas, anniversary, birthday or housewarming holiday, this gorgeous and unique personalised vase will be a hit. It is an ideal gift for family, friends and loved ones.
